name: HR operations in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 timesheets/month tool
description: For HR operations in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 timesheets/month, inaccurate tracking causes payroll discrepancies. We monitor timesheets and alert HR ops instead of manual tracking.
target_audience: HR operations in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 timesheets/month
problem_solved: Inaccurate tracking of employee hours leading to payroll errors.
